scope.target: HANDOFF-001 machine-readable receiving checkpoint, critical gate evidence, and provider-native attribution compatibility
constraints: Fail closed on red critical gate
Require real provider fixtures before provider-specific rules
non_goals: Normalize all providers to one trailer

steps: Redesign commit attribution acceptance without mutation
execution.last_completed_step: Pinned the clean HANDOFF core commit, captured a real 30/30 critical gate, registered a machine-readable receiving checkpoint, captured the Codex local attribution fixture, and retained explicit blocked states for unavailable provider-native fixtures.
execution.next_action: Implement the REL-001 sanctioned release-phase contract and cold-start publication gates under V050-009.

results.summary: HANDOFF-001 core receiving semantics are implemented and exercised with a real clean checkpoint; the REL-specific handoff path remains fail-closed until V050-009 supplies its sanctioned commands.
results.residual_risk: REL phase activation is owned by V050-009. Copilot CLI, Copilot cloud-agent, and Claude provider-native fixture paths remain explicitly blocked until real commits are available; the repository does not guess their identities.
